why_sme: AWS explicitly describes Curantis as an SMB based in Texas, which is strong SME evidence, and the official company website is public.
problem_summary: Curantis needed to unify fragmented clinical data, meet FHIR-related interoperability expectations, and give internal teams and customers faster access to analytics. The problem is concrete, regulated, and clearly documented.
named_solution_provider: AWS HealthLake / AWS QuickSight / AWS Kinesis
assessment: Strong healthcare candidate with explicit SMB labeling, a confirmed public website, and a concrete data/compliance problem.

why_sme: The case describes a therapy practice and frames the business as a practice-scale operation, which is a reasonable SME signal.
problem_summary: Digital Practice was spending time on repetitive backend admin work that reduced focus on the therapy practice itself. The challenge is operational efficiency through workflow automation rather than a vague transformation claim.
assessment: Good healthcare-services lead with a clear admin burden problem; official website and stronger size evidence should be confirmed.

why_sme: Zoho Desk lists 11-50 employees, which strongly supports SME-scale operations for this workflow.
problem_summary: HealthServe discovered needs that went beyond clinic work, including broader mental and healthcare counseling support for migrant workers, and had to log and follow up every incoming call efficiently. The candidate has a concrete intake, service-coordination, and support-management problem.
assessment: Strong service-operations candidate with public website, employee band, and an explicit operational challenge.

why_sme: The official LinkedIn company page for Budget Challenge (operated by ProperLiving LLC) lists the organization in the 2-10 employees band, which is explicit micro-SME evidence alongside the public official website.
problem_summary: Budget Challenge was unhappy with the CRM capabilities of Freshworks and needed a more integrated platform for business operations. The problem is specific enough to support a structured packet.
assessment: Advance-ready micro-SME education candidate with explicit employee band, public official website, and a concrete software-process problem.

why_sme: Zoho Desk lists 51-200 employees, which is strong SME evidence for this workflow, and the official site confirms a focused nonprofit organization rather than a large university or district.
problem_summary: NAF had limited support staff but still needed to provide around-the-clock help to users. The documented challenge is customer-support scale and service coverage rather than a generic technology upgrade.
assessment: Strong education-support operations problem with explicit employee band and a confirmed official website.

why_sme: Zoho Workplace states the business has 125 employees, which is strong SME evidence. Candidate official domains onebusinesssolutions.com, onemvt.com, and answeringserviceone.com were all unreachable on 2026-04-17 (TLS/connection errors) so no live primary site can be cited.
problem_summary: ONE Business Solutions struggled with scattered information, low visibility across offices, and inefficient decision-making in a distributed call-center environment. The challenge is a concrete professional-services coordination problem.
assessment: Strong SME signal but no reachable official website; hold in reserve until a live primary source can be confirmed.
